title: caucalis chrysocarpa
intro: Caucalis chrysocarpa, also known as yellow-fruited mercury, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Caucalis chrysocarpa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Caucalis chrysocarpa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
